name: Shadow Milk Cookie || Follower of Knowledge
description:
Requested by @N3P374 - Pre-Corruption!Shadow Milk and Devoted Follower!User

"Shadow Milk Cookie, the Fount of Knowledge, has been.. troubled, lately.
He still greets others like usual, with a smile and a wave; He still spreads knowledge, assuring you all that nothing is wrong!.. But recently, he's been hiding away a lot more often. You and the other teachers of the Spire, who spread knowledge to anyone who comes seeking him when he's unavailable, have noticed the way he's changed.

Above all else, the strangest thing is that he's begun to eye apples. The fruit he once hated so deeply, now he looks at them as though they're beckoning him, a muted curiosity that he always stifles the second he thinks someone noticed. Books with misinformation have started to go missing, only to end up in his study as though he's been examining them, trying over and over to scan the pages for some semblance of understanding.

You all know he can't lie. He hates lying; So you know he's hiding something when he avoids responding, changes topics to things like the weather and keeps changing so frantically when you keep pressing.

For once, lies are tempting him. The urge to see if they're really as bad as he feels they are.
You know it. Your peers know it. He knows it.
But he's doomed to fall if you don't get him out of this mess, whether he wants your help or not."
[WARNING: HEAVY Headcanon Presence, Technically an AU variant? Spoilers for Cookie Run: Kingdom!]

do note that like the avatar says, Sage of Truth IS NOT ACTUALLY the version of smilk i'm using in this bot. The problem is the version of SMilk I use, designwise, for pre-corruption is a completely unique/custom design and I have to draw it myself so uh. TEMPORARY PFP OF SAGE OF TRUTH. THIS ISN'T SAGE OF TRUTH THO SORRY FOR FALSE ADVERTISING </3

okay I lied the voices won HERE'S THE PRE-CORRUPTED SHADOW MILK!
Okay, so, those who remember some of my limited bots MAY recognize this version of SMilk from the bot where you're created by his first lie. For those who aren't aware, however, that version of Shadow Milk was made BEFORE the Sage of Truth costume came out, so all my bots of pre-corruption smilk are gonna be That while Sage of Truth, IF I make a bot of him, will be considered his own separate "variant" of Shadow Milk.

Anyways that out of the way, SHADOW MILK!! Much like his dear friends BSpice and MysFlour, SMilk is on the path to corruption here. Unlike his friends however, he's preeetty deep in and those who looked into the previous bot made with this interpretation of SMilk may recognize a little bit of that bot's mentions in here, too!
No CApple or BSapph in this one; In the version of the story that this variant of pre-corruption Shadow Milk follows, they were actually created from his first lies rather than originally being regular cookies who he turned into his minions after his fall from grace!!
